title: Video by floorballgoalie_1
description:
🦵 #FloorballGoaliestrength part 5 🦵 

Weighted side lunge. Goalie oriented exercise that imitates the push movement. Mostly on the side leg but also requires both core and shoulder strength and stability. 

This is a series where I show you some strength/power exercises that I do. For basic strength do 6-10 reps each side for 2-3 rounds. The weights I use are from 10-20kg. All of the videos will be under the following hastag #FloorballGoaliestrength 

* Extra thanks to @niilo_jyrkka for some of these excercises🙏
